productDisplayName: W Women Printed Navy Blue Kurtas
description: Composition Navy blue kurti made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with raglan sleeves that have pleated edges, and white print with a batik feel Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look.
